channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Shortening Billions
item.description: Designing a URL shortener for billions of requests

item.title: Event Driven Done Right
item.description: Event-driven architecture in practice: handling event versioning, schema evolution, and data consistency

item.title: Code For All: Myth Busted
item.description: Coding education has limitations and biases

item.title: K8s: Help or Hurt?
item.description: K8s: Help or Hurt? When to use Kubernetes

item.title: Tech Paychecks Revealed
item.description: Tech salaries in 2026: average pay, industry standards

item.title: Boost Your Career: Contribute to Open Source Today
item.description: Contribute to open source today with this step-by-step guide using GitHub CLI, Dev Containers, and CodeQL—real tradeoffs, benchmarks, and hiring impact.

item.title: AI Tools for Students: Boost Grades & Save Time
item.description: AI study tools only work if you fix your data pipeline first—convert PDFs to Markdown, chunk notes smartly, and use retrieval not chatbots

item.title: Validate Your Startup Idea Before You Build
item.description: Stop wasting months building the wrong startup. Learn how to validate ideas with $1 pre-authorizations, fake doors, and behavioral signals instead of vanity metrics.

item.title: Design Patterns You'll Actually Use in Code
item.description: Practical guide to design patterns that work in production, with benchmarks, code, and honest tradeoffs for Java, .NET, and Python

item.title: Why Side Projects Fail & How to Succeed Instead
item.description: Side projects fail when over-engineered and under-validated—here’s the real playbook with hard numbers and tradeoffs from 50+ projects

item.title: Master Mobile CI/CD Automation Today!
item.description: Mobile CI/CD pipelines optimized: cut build time 47%, reduce false failures 60%, and shrink artifact bloat 19% with real benchmarks and code.

item.title: Boost Your Workflow: Free AI Tools Pros Swear By
item.description: Free AI tools that slash context switching by 60%—with real latency, memory, and ROI numbers from 12 engineers over 6 weeks.

item.title: Microservices vs Monolith: The Honest Showdown
item.description: Microservices vs monolith benchmarks: real latency, cost, and complexity numbers from production systems

item.title: Cloud Security Best Practices for Developers: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to Cloud Security Best Practices for Developers covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: Master Cybersecurity: Outsmart Social Engineers
item.description: Social engineering bypasses firewalls 74% of the time. Learn how to harden identity, monitor DMs, and automate response with real metrics and code examples.

item.title: Fast-Track Your Tech Career: Promotion Hacks
item.description: Tech promotion hacks: align work to revenue, negotiate every 90 days, and get promoted in 12–18 months using real $ metrics and case studies.
